results.title: Drew Monti hits 3000-win plateau In Buffalo Raceway victory
results.description: HAMBURG — Make My Deo ($4.68) was able to make driver Drew Monti's day on Saturday afternoon (June 6) at Buffalo Raceway as he rallied from six lengths down with a quarter mile to pace to give Monti his 3,000th...

results.title: West Ham co-owner accused of preying on women for sex
results.description: Multiple women have accused billionaire businessman and West Ham co-owner David Sullivan of abusing his power and preying on them for sex, in some cases when they were teenagers. The allegations from seven women have been uncovered in a joint investigation by BBC Panorama and the Times and span decades, starting in the 1980s. All [...] The post West Ham co-owner accused of preying on women for sex appeared first on Kahawatungu .

results.title: Top 2 seeds ousted in chaotic opening day at Libema Open
results.description: The No. 1 and No. 2 seeds each fell in straight sets on a chaotic first day of women's competition in the Libema Open at ‘s-Hertogenbosch in the Netherlands on Monday.

results.title: How Jahdae Barron Could Be the Broncos X-Factor Next Season
results.description: The Denver Broncos have a plethora of talent when it comes to the cornerback position. Three-time All-Pro Pat Surtain II is obviously the most notable, but behind him in the depth chart are former third-round pick Riley Moss and potential breakout star Jahdae Barron. The Broncos' starting corners last year were amongst the league's best, ...
